# oversized first-party file-size hygiene baseline
# format: <accepted-byte-count> <tracked-path>
# threshold_bytes 131072
# Generated by: scripts/check-file-size-hygiene.sh --update
# Ratchet rule: baselined files may shrink or disappear, but may not grow.
# New non-exempt tracked files above threshold_bytes fail the guard.
# Exemptions: vendor/generated/worktree dirs and shared/core-terminal.

180197 app/src/main/java/com/pocketshell/app/projects/FolderListViewModel.kt
